name: G.b's Garlic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all dry ingredients to the blender container.
2. Cover and process at STIR speed until well mixed.
3. Turn off the blender, then add the remaining ingredients.
4. Cover and process at BLEND speed until thickened.
5. For a stronger garlic flavor, you may add an extra teaspoon of garlic powder.
